content.text: hello I'm Brian Tracy and today I want
to give you some marketing tips to help
you to build your network network
marketing is one of the most popular
ways for people to venture into the
world of entrepreneurialism
however succeeding in network marketing
is not as easy as its popularity would
suggest and in order to make good money
at it you're going to have to be both
driven and strategic before we get into
how to succeed as a network marketer
it's important to better understand just
what network marketing is network
marketing is defined as a business model
in which companies sell their products
in bulk at discounted prices to
individuals who will then resell those
products as network marketers network
marketers may also receive incentives
for bringing other network marketers
into the business examples of businesses
that offer network marketing
opportunities include Avon Amway
Tupperware Cutco and many others with
that said let's dive into the tips on
how to succeed as a network marketer to
help you out here are five great tips
for network marketing success and by the
way I have been in a variety of
different network marketing companies
and I still am because of the quality
and the pricing of the products there's
a wonderful business or way of earning
money first choose the right company
finding success as a network marketer
will come a lot easier if you choose the
right company to work with in the first
place
narrow your search to establish
companies with great products and a
generous pay plan it will also help if
the company and their products are
offering something that you are
knowledgeable or passionate about
lastly if a company ever gives you the
feeling that they are running a pyramid
scheme get out while you can
second take advantage of available
training most established businesses
that are rely on network marketing is
part of their business model will have
training resources in place to help
their network marketers have success
selling their products the training is
absolutely vital for success in a small
business whether these resources come in
the forms of videos ebooks or documents
that they mail to you take advantage of
them nobody is going to have the inside
scoop on how to sell a product quite
like the company that is putting it on
the market so learn everything you can
from them and attend the meetings that
they hold to train their people make
this a regular part of your life either
as we say get in or get out
third develop relationships with your
fellow marketers finding success as a
network marketer is all about the
relationships you develop while
relationships with your customers are
certainly important so are the
relationships with the people above you
and below you in the line the people
above you the people who may have
brought you into the business are people
that you can look to for guidance and
support and and for selfish reasons the
more they help you and you take there to
help the more you will sell and the more
both of you will earn at the same time
you need to make sure that you are
providing guidance and support to the
people that you bring on this is your
responsibility is to help and support
these people and make them successful in
the end it'll work out better for
everyone involved if you take the time
to develop relationships with your
fellow marketers fourth take care of
business you need to treat network
marketing like a legitimate business
that you own this includes keeping great
records of your tax write-offs writing
out a business plan developing new
strategies doing your research and more
many people start off in life with no
money at all and a network marketing
opportunity enables them to start their
own business with a very small amount of
money and a lot of sweat so you can
replace capital financial equity with
sweat equity and become very successful
once you start seeing some financial
success as a network marketer
you may want to consider working with an
accountant to help you save as much as
possible in taxes there are dozens of
ways to save in taxes that you can take
advantage of if you own your own
business or even if you change the
structure of the business that you own
for example you could put your children
on your payroll and deduct much or all
of them let you pay them from your taxes
so you benefit your children benefit the
only people who don't benefit are the
tax people in the end the more you treat
network marketing like a small business
that you own which it essentially what
it is the more successful you will be I
remember a friend of mine who worked in
network marketing for years and did an
average job he was doing quite well and
then one day he took off and within
three or four years he was earning
hundreds of thousands of dollars a year
and I asked him it was Nick I said Nick
what was the turning point for you and
he said I finally decided to get serious
about this business I realized that this
is a serious business and it is as
serious as you take it to be so I
decided to get really serious about the
business and it just exploded now he
lives in a beautiful home in an
expensive neighborhood his kids are in
beautiful colleges he's got a bank
account full of money in a new car same
product same market same customers the
difference was his attitude and that
must be your attitude as well finally
take advantage of the internet the
Internet has revolutionized the way
marketers are able to interact with
potential customers and the same goes
for network marketing note however
this doesn't mean simply spamming your
Facebook friends constantly which is as
far as many network marketers take their
online efforts well you certainly should
reach out to your social media friends
especially starting out there are a
wealth of other opportunities that the
internet provides as well
these include starting a website or blog
on a particular subject creating YouTube
videos building social-media followings
capturing the email addresses of leads
and marketing to them using a service
such as MailChimp and more how far you
take your online marketing efforts is
really dependent on your skills and the
amount of time you are willing to commit
in other words how serious you are if
done right though online marketing
offers a lot of potential to network
marketers and the potential is limited
pretty much by your own imagination
network marketing is alive and well and
many driven individuals are able to turn
it into a highly profitable career if
you'd like to start finding success as a
network marketer be sure to do your
research follow the tips above and put
in the work that is necessary you may
find that network marketing is one of
the most rewarding endeavors you've ever
undertaken before we wrap up I'd like to
leave you with a thought to share with
your friends and followers make others
feel important the more important you
make them feel the more important you
will feel as well now I'd love to hear
from you so my question for today is
this what person would benefit you the
most from meeting how can you meet that
person and get them in your network
leave a comment below and I'll be sure
to follow up with you thanks for
watching and remember if you want to
change your future take action and take
action now if you enjoyed this video and
feel it was valuable in teaching you
about building your network subscribe to
my channel like this video and share
this video with your friends don't
forget to click the button on the screen
for a free gift thanks again for
watching
